title: Pan-Seared Chicken Tagine
description: A crispy chicken dish with the flavors of North Africa, served with a side of steaming vegetables.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and tagine spice blend.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and sear until golden brown, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the sliced onions to the skillet.
Cook until the onions are lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer until cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
Garnish with crispy onions and serve hot.
Serve with steaming vegetables, such as carrots and zucchini.
